title: Citrix NetScaler Flaws
summary: [P1] Citrix has patched six NetScaler flaws allowing file read and denial-of-service, which can be exploited to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data. The patch is currently available and should be applied as soon as possible. Why now: The patch is currently available and the vulnerabilities can be exploited to gain unauthorized access to sensitive data. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerabilities allow for file read and denial-of-service, which can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data.
